ogTitle: Hyams Beach vs Hyland Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hyams Beach and Hyland Park.
heading: Hyams Beach vs Hyland Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hyams Beach, New South Wales and Hyland Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hyland Park has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Hyams Beach (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hyams Beach or Hyland Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hyams Beach has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Hyland Park scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hyams Beach scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Hyland Park scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hyams Beach or Hyland Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hyland Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
